description: Perform a LASSO (L1) regularized regression analysis using the dataset '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/BigFivePersonalityTraits.csv' to predict 'Neuroticism' using 'Agreeableness', 'Conscientiousness', 'Extraversion', and 'Openness' as predictors. Configure the analysis with a 30% test set holdout and a random seed of 42. Save the JASP project to '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/LassoRegressionBigFive.jasp' and create a text report at '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/lasso_report.txt' documenting the Test Set RMSE, R-squared, and which predictors were retained with non-zero coefficients.
